briefs.title: Port land property assessments updated for the 2026 taxation year in BC
briefs.summary: BC has updated the Port Land Valuation Regulation to apply to the 2026 taxation year, using property values as of December 31, 2025. This means the assessed values (the dollar amounts used to calculate property taxes) for designated port lands in BC have been refreshed with a new schedule for 2026.
briefs.action_required: Check your 2026 property tax assessment if you own or lease port land in BC.

key_dates.label: BC Port Land Valuation Regulation 2026 taxation year takes effect

briefs.industries: Transportation & Logistics, Natural Resources, Landlord & Property Mgmt
